_comment: Populated at setup time via rt_list_sources and rt_list_domains

ecommerce.campaign_name: Wesley - Peptide Eye Patches - Facebook - Ecomm

challenger_aa.description: Full personalization thread (analyzer steps + headline + CTA all echo Q1 concern) — retained champion (2.19% CVR, $0.65 EPC over 1612 clicks)

challenger_ae.description: Concern-specific Q3 follow-up + personalized offer subtitle (Targets [concern] in as few as 3 uses)

challenger_af.description: Outcome hero headline (What If You Could Fix Your Under-Eyes in Just 7 Days?) + live countdown timer in CTA button

challenger_ac_v011.retired_reason: Cycle-011 scrapped: campaign rotation cleared by user. Only 105 clicks (1 conv, 0.95% CVR). Inconclusive.

challenger_ad_v011.retired_reason: Cycle-011 scrapped: campaign rotation cleared by user. Only 104 clicks (1 conv, 0.96% CVR). Inconclusive.

champion_v001.retired_reason: 0 LP views — Framer page missing track.js

challenger_b_v001.retired_reason: 0 conversions, CTA linked to Shopify instead of RT offer URL

challenger_q_v005.retired_reason: Cycle-005 loser: dual scarcity (3min timer + stock counter) — 2.31% CVR vs champion O at 2.86%

challenger_r_v005.retired_reason: Cycle-005 loser: pain-first quiz questions — 1.04% CVR vs champion O at 2.86%

challenger_s_v006.retired_reason: Cycle-006 loser: Veo closeup results video — 0 conv on 104 clicks (0% CVR) vs champion O at 2.50%

challenger_t_v006.retired_reason: Cycle-006 loser: science headline + batch scarcity — 0.46% CVR (1 conv on 216 clicks) vs champion O at 2.50%

challenger_o_v008.retired_reason: Cycle-008: Dethroned by W. EPC $0.61 vs W $0.73. Compact offer row + navy CTA outperformed by featured product card + coral CTA.

challenger_x_v008.retired_reason: Cycle-008: Highest LP CTR (30.3%) but lowest EPC ($0.49). Review snippet sets expectations Shopify checkout doesn't fulfill.

challenger_w_v009.retired_reason: Cycle-009: Dethroned by Y. 2.36% CVR / $0.67 EPC vs Y at 3.21% / $1.00. Generic headline couldn't compete with personalized concern echo.

challenger_z_v009.retired_reason: Cycle-009: Recency hero count + clinical proof. 2.50% CVR / $1.00 EPC vs Y at 3.21% / $1.00. Daily count (2nd loss) and clinical proof didn't outperform personalization.

challenger_y_v010.retired_reason: Cycle-010: Dethroned by AA. 1.95% CVR / $0.66 EPC vs AA at 2.58% / $0.66. Generic analyzer + generic CTA lost to full personalization thread.

challenger_ab_v010.retired_reason: Cycle-010: Concern-matched reviews + toast notifications. 1.48% CVR / $0.44 EPC. Matched reviews feel manufactured, toasts are negative signal. Lowest LP CTR at 14.4%.

ecommerce_medicube.campaign_name: Wesley - Medicube Night Mask - Facebook - Ecomm

editorial_v2.description: Editorial VSL with refi learnings: institutional header, blue CTA, cycle scarcity, 10min timer, loss-aversion body copy, autoplay video

quiz_v1.description: Quiz format cloned from refi RF3D-AA champion: 3 questions (ownership duration, prior exit attempts, aspirational outcome), answer-echo headline, 10min timer, institutional framing

editorial_v1.retired_reason: Original clone from easybenefithub.com. Not registered in RT. Replaced by editorial-v2 with refi optimization learnings applied.

rf3d_aa.description: Answer-echo headline + 10min reservation timer — confirmed champion through 8 cycles (6.93% CVR, $1.66 EPC in cycle-008)

rf3d_ar.description: Full-screen step flow (Rocket Mortgage UX + gov aesthetic). One question per screen, thin progress bar, immersive centered layout, dashboard-panel result page.

rf3d_as.description: Official determination notice. Document/letter format with reference number, date, inline pill verification, formal determination section with bordered amount box.

rf3d_am_v008.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-008: Probable loser (early cut). 5.02% CVR, $1.21 EPC, -$52 loss (219 clicks, 11 conv). 28% below AA. Question title + personalized processing did not improve performance.

rf3d_an_v008.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-008: Below baseline (early cut). 6.20% CVR, $1.49 EPC, $32 profit (258 clicks, 16 conv). 11% below AA today, 23% below baseline. Positive alert + timer above CTA did not improve performance.

rf3d_ak_v007.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-007: Statistical tie with AA (p=0.74). AK trended better on all metrics (8.52% CVR, $2.04 EPC, $481 profit vs AA 8.08%, $1.86, $372) but not significant. Components isolated into AM and AN for cycle-008.

rf3d_al_v007.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-007: Early cut (day 1). Worst on every metric: 7.03% CVR, $1.69 EPC, $101 profit vs AK at 8.52%/$2.05/$175 and AA at 8.07%/$1.87/$167. Step-progress title + range anchor added no value.

rf3d_y_v002.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-002: Dethroned by AA. 7.12% CVR vs AA 9.95%. Generic headline couldn't compete with answer-echo personalization + timer.

rf3d_ab_v002.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-002: Never properly in RT rotation. 6.87% CVR, -$4 loss. Salesy CTA broke gov tone, applicant counter interrupted result flow.

rf3d_w.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-001 loser: dollar CTA + 15min timer — 7.58% CVR vs winner Y at 8.02%

rf3d_x.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-001 loser: 3-step verification + range — 7.36% CVR vs winner Y at 8.02%

rf3d_z.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-001 worst: loss-aversion frame — 6.58% CVR, -$45 loss

rf3d_ac_v003.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-003: Q3-echo desc + green CTA. 7.14% CVR vs AA at 10.13%. Green CTA semantic confusion + description speed bump.

rf3d_ad_v003.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-003: Never in RT rotation (3rd lander bug). Only 87 clicks. Inconclusive.

rf3d_ae_v004.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-004: Worst performer ever. 5.45% CVR. Removing description removes needed breathing room between amount and CTA.

rf3d_af_v004.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-004/005: Q3-echo headline significantly worse than Q1-echo (6.96% vs 9.50%, p<0.05). Quiz expectation = screening result, not product pitch.

rf3d_ag_v005.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-005: Statistical tie (p=0.53). Conversational Q2 + multi-step processing had zero effect.

rf3d_ah_v005.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-005: Statistical tie (p=0.76). Speed subtitle + emotional Q3 had zero effect.

rf3d_ai_v006.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-006: Statistical tie (7.06%, p=0.48). Question headline didn't improve engagement.

rf3d_aj_v006.retired_reason: Refi-cycle-006: Probable loser (4.88% CVR, 39% drop). State-based Q1 added friction, 3-min timer too aggressive.
